extractions.problem: Integrating cellular knowledge across scales to comprehend cellular behaviors
extractions.method: Computational modeling approaches for virtual cell construction
extractions.finding: Next generation virtual cells achievable goal for computational biology

extractions.problem: Students have difficulty conceptualizing dynamic nature of cells at multiple scales
extractions.finding: Animations effectively improved student conceptual understanding

extractions.problem: Virtual memory CD8 T cells found in unchallenged mice, mechanism unclear
extractions.method: Analysis of virtual memory T cell development and homeostatic proliferation
extractions.finding: VM cell development involves homeostatic proliferation with stratified responsiveness

extractions.problem: Drug repurposing strategy for SARS-CoV-2 antiviral agents
extractions.method: Molecular docking and drug screening against viral protease

extractions.problem: Automated cell nucleus segmentation for quantitative pathology analysis
extractions.method: Contour tracing for grayscale image segmentation
extractions.finding: Improved automated cell nucleus segmentation method

extractions.problem: Virtual staining for morphological analysis of biological cells
extractions.method: Digital holography-based virtual staining without chemical stains
extractions.finding: Virtual staining circumvents toxicity, saves time, enables concurrent staining

extractions.problem: Mechanism of morphogenetic signals engaging regulatory networks in embryonic patterning
extractions.method: Gene regulatory network model embedded in cellular agents (GARMEN)
extractions.finding: Integrated three hierarchical levels of cell-fate control

extractions.problem: SARS-CoV-2 entry mechanism via spike protein binding to ACE2 receptor
extractions.method: Molecular dynamics simulation with GROMOS96 force field

extractions.problem: Assessing educational impact of VR on cell biology learning and engagement
extractions.method: VR-based cell biology course using HTC Vive platform
extractions.finding: VR enhanced student learning experience in cell biology

extractions.problem: Path integration error correction during spatial navigation
extractions.method: Direct recording of grid-like neuronal activity during spatial tasks
extractions.finding: Novel cue cells in MEC with spatial firing patterns
